lot 2.0 tar download zip download Ptplot1.3p1 Earlier versions Skip to sidebar Ptplot Ptplot 5.10 is a 2D data plotter and histogram tool implemented in Java. Ptplot can be used as a standalone applet or application, or it can be embedded in your ow

t or application, or it can be embedded in your own applet or application. Ptplot a part of Ptolemy II , but Ptplot is also available as a separate download. Patches and Extensions (06/05) Use Ptplot on the Sharp Zaurus PDA . We've made a small stand

on the Sharp Zaurus PDA . We've made a small standalone example available that uses Ptplot3.1. (11/02) exportPNG-0.0.1.patch.gz is a gzipped patch to Ptplot 5.2 by Bernard Guillot that "allows Easy Export to PNG. This in turn becomes an easy path to

port to PNG. This in turn becomes an easy path to export to GIF and JPG.". Portions of the patch are under the GNU Lesser General Public License 2.1, see http://www.gnu.org/copyleft/lesser.html for details. (6/02) ptolemy-plot-servlet.tar.gz is a gz

etails. (6/02) ptolemy-plot-servlet.tar.gz is a gzipped tar file that contains sample code to use Ptplot as a servlet. The code was written by Alberto Gobbi, and has _not_ been tested by the Ptplot pteam at UC Berkeley. History January 25, 2015: Ptpl
